title: EDS 18” Garden Broom Head ONLY Outdoor Natural Bassine Hard Bristle Broom with Durable Support Bracket Yard Brush Heavy Duty Broom Outdoor Stiff Sweeping Yard (PACK OF 2)
features: [ DURABLE & LONG-LASTING ] Made with Premium Quality Natural Heavy Duty Bassine Bristles, the yard cleaning broom is resistant to chemicals, oil and grease, while the resilient plastic head on a wooden broom will not bend or break easily even with rough and tough cleaning.

[ PREMIUM BRISTLES ] The Broom Head is crafted with quality original Bassine fibre bristles. You can easily gather both large debris and fine particles. These hard bristles work efficiently to gather up all messes without scattering.

[ HEAVY DUTY BRISTLES ] The garden broom Head outdoor is finished with stiff bristles for sweeping heavy things with efficiency such as grass, soil, sands, snow, leaves which tend to stick to the ground and it is suitable for using in wet or dry conditions, won't be rotten and deformed.

[ WOODEN BROOM HEAD ] The wooden broom head is lightweight yet strong enough to support you on daily sweeping tasks. The head of our broomstick takes a special process to make it more durable and better than an ordinary broom

[ WIDELY USED ] Our indoor and outdoor broom head can be used on most floor surfaces, including wood, linoleum, tile, concrete and cement. Ideal for home, kitchen and outdoor rough surface, patios, sidewalks, driveways and industrial spaces, shops, garages, porch and warehouse.
description: Product Description Stiff Broom Bristles This broom is constructed using high-quality materials to ensure long-term, reliable use and is specifically designed to reach under low-profile objects to simplify your cleaning tasks. It’s the sturdy, yet lightweight and compact broom of your dreams. Multi-Purpose Durable broom/brush for outdoor or industrial use. Ideal for outdoor patios, sidewalks, driveways or industrial spaces, workshops, garages and more. Durable Broom The professional brooms outdoor is made from high quality, durable materials. The push joint is deeper, easy to push and assemble tightly, Say goodbye to loose handles. Effective Cleaning Efficiently sweep up fine particles such as sugar, salt, hair, lint and crumbs on all hard surfaces with the Fuller Kitchen Broom. Made with Fuller Brush quality, split-end, flagged bristles, this broom is sure to pick up the finest dust, debris and crumbs from your hard floors to deliver a thorough sweeping each and every time. 10” Soft Coco Bristles Broom 10” Hard Bassine Bristles Broom 18” Soft Coco Bristles Broom 18” Hard Bassine Bristles Broom Scrubbing Brush Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,397 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,397 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 4.3 out of 5 stars 985 4.1 out of 5 stars 10 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £6.49 £ 6 . 49 Wooden Handle ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Surface Type Tile, Vinyl, Laminate, Wood, Polished Concrete Tile, Vinyl, Laminate, Wood, Polished Concrete Tile, Vinyl, Laminate, Wood, Polished Concrete Tile, Vinyl, Laminate, Wood, Polished Concrete Tile, Vinyl, Laminate, Wood, Polished Concrete Quick Cleans ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Bristle Material Coco Bassine Coco Bassine Bassine Easy Grip ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
